pages_tested.notes: 9 sections, 26 CTAs, no JS errors, full heading hierarchy, skip link, rich OG meta
13 headings, legal content present, no errors
19 headings, legal content present, no errors
Custom 404 page renders, back-to-home link, SVG watermark
Form with email/password/submit, Zod validation works, no errors
6 fields (fullName, CRO, email, password, confirmPassword, checkbox), terms/privacy links, PasswordRequirements component
Form works, 'Email enviado!' success toast, back to login link
Shows 'Link inválido ou expirado' when no valid token — expected behavior
Shows 'Avaliação não encontrada' for invalid token — expected error handling

a11y_findings.form_labels: All inputs properly labeled with htmlFor

insights: Pattern: /pricing is auth-protected (inside ProtectedRoute) — correct UX design
Testing pattern: Hub fill() does not trigger React controlled input onChange — use type() instead
Google Fonts status:0 in performance API is expected cross-origin behavior, not a bug
recommendations: Consider adding visual regression baselines for future comparisons
Consider adding E2E auth tests with real Supabase test credentials

The /pricing page is auth-protected — users who click pricing from landing header go to login, then pricing after auth. Consider a public pricing stub or redirect to landing#pricing for unauthenticated users
Register form: empty submit doesn't show validation errors immediately (no captcha configured in dev) — behavior is correct but may confuse users in prod without Cloudflare Turnstile

scenarios.title: Register page loads and form works
